struct Invoice {
    amount: f64,
    tax: f64,
    total: f64,
    currency: String,
}

impl Invoice {
    fn new(amount: f64, tax_rate: f64, currency: &str) -> Self {
        let tax = amount * tax_rate;
        Self {
            amount,
            tax,
            total: amount + tax,
            currency: currency.into(),
        }
    }

    fn apply_discount(&mut self, pct: f64) {
        self.amount *= 1.0 - pct;
        self.total = self.amount + self.tax;
    }
}

struct PriceBook {
    base_price: f64,
    discount: f64,
}
